$schema_note: Registry of build-in-public projects. Single source of truth for status and Work-page graduation. status 'active' shows under Building; status 'shipped' + a `work` object also renders on the main Work page (merged by lib/portfolio.ts).

projects.title: RegWatch
projects.tagline: Google Alerts for the Diário Oficial da União (DOU)
projects.blurb: A monitoring service that watches Brazil's federal gazette (the DOU) and alerts professional-services firms when their clients or topics are mentioned.

projects.title: ReplayGate
projects.tagline: Cross-turn regression testing for multi-turn, channel-native AI agents
projects.blurb: A harness that records a real agent conversation — its LLM and tool calls — into a deterministic fixture, then replays it to assert cross-turn invariants like "never books before the user confirms": the whole-conversation bugs that per-turn tests miss, on the channel the agent actually runs on.
